title: nachath #5181
definition:
1) to go down, descend
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to go down, descend
        1a2) to descend, descend into (chastisement) (fig.)
    1b) (Niphal) to come down into, penetrate
    1c) (Piel) to cause to descend, press down, stretch (a bow)
    1d) (Hiphil) to bring down
nasbUsage:
